original_statement: which party was in office the most?
mutated_statement: which group was in office the most and the least?
mutation_analysis: Entity generalization + Intent expansion (comparative addition): "party" → "group" (specific term generalized) | addition of "and the least" expands query from asking only which was in office the most to asking both most and least (which party was in office the most? → which group was in office the most and the least?)

behavior_analysis.behavior_category: 无视部分矛盾指令，同时合理化部分矛盾指令（局部执行无视，全局解释合理化）
behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 从 judge_thought 中可见关键证据：代理在 judge_thought 中列出按党派计数（Republican:27, Democrat:20, 等）并得出结论“Republicans 最多，Independent 最少”，同时指出“Prediction Answer is missing”。chain 显示其执行为一系列机械的数据操作（add_column/select/group/sort/simple_query），没有生成最终的标准化预测字段。表现特征为：在执行层面按常规流程完成计数/推理（局部执行），但未把结果以预期的预测输出形式返回，而是在 judge_thought 中以解释性文字展现结论（全局解释）。因此归类为“无视部分矛盾指令，同时合理化部分矛盾指令（局部执行无视，全局解释合理化）”。
